upasargachandrika.example_text: 'api pracIyante saMvyavahArARAM vfdDilABAH' (mudrA॰1) pracIyante eDante
'parezAmuttamANgAni pracinvantamaTezuBiH' (BA॰BIzma॰6.14.11) Cindantam ityarTaH
'pracIyamAnAvayavA rarAja sA' (raGu॰3.7) varDamAnagAtrA
'pAtakapracayavanmama BUyaH puRyapuYjamapi nATa lunIhi kAYcanI Bavatu lohamayI vA SfNKalA yadi pade na viSezaH' (sA0 su0 si0 8387).. pracayaH samUhaH

'eza te vihito rAjan DAtrA DarmaH sanAtanaH tasmAdapacitaH pArTa loke hAsyaM gamizyasi' (BA॰vana॰33.56).. apacito hInaH

'avindeTAmapacitiM vaDatrEH' (f॰4.28.4) apacitiM vEraniryAtanam
'na vEnateyo garuqaH praSaMsati mahAjanam dfzwvA suparRo'pacitiM mahatyA api BArata' (BA॰BIzma॰3.84) apacitiM nASam
'BavedapacitiH pUjAvyayanizkftihAnizviti medinI
mama lubDasya pApasya taTA DarmApacAyinaH' (BA॰droRa॰150.18) DarmApacAyinaH=Darmakzepakasya

'yaTA vAcamavacinvanti santaH' (BA0 vana0 16426) santaH sadasadvivecanacaRAH parIkzanta ityAha
'hastyaSvAvacayaScEva' (hari0 27924) avacayaH samUhaH

'ava syUmeva cinvatI maGonyuzA yAti svasarasya patnI' (f0 3614) avacinvatI syUma (vAsaH pariDAnIyam)=pratisaMharantI vivfRvatIti kecitsAmpratikAH so'yaM SabdamaryAdayA durlaBorTaH na hyavacayaH kvacitpratisaMhAraM vivaraRaM Aha syUmeva vastramiva vistftaM tamo'vacinvatI avacayaM apakzayaM nayantIti sAyaRaH hfdayaNgamamidaM vAgvyahAravido BAzyakArasya vyAKyAnam na hyaSakyArTe SaktiH kalpanIyA SabdAnAm iti smaraRIyamaDunAtanEH
